candidate_check.description: The Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system must implement certificate status checking for PKI authentication.

fix_text_excerpt:
Configure the operating system to do certificate status checking for PKI authentication.

Modify all of the "cert_policy" lines in "/etc/pam_pkcs11/pam_pkcs11.conf" to include "ocsp_on".
title: The Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system must implement certificate status checking for PKI authentication.
